name: eight_sector_signed_grammar_v0_1
purpose: Finite lookup model for sector-oriented signed lift+twist reconciliation.

sector_id.description: Internal sector in which the spark resolves.

sector_orientation.description: Orientation label associated with the sector.

signed_operator.description: Signed lift+twist grammar assigned by the sector.

canonical_sentence: The spark's internal sector determines the signed lift+twist grammar in one move.
